name: The Mosaic Company
description: The Mosaic Company is a leading global producer and marketer of concentrated phosphate and potash crop nutrients. Headquartered in Tampa, Florida, the company mines and processes these essential minerals into high-quality fertilizers that help farmers worldwide maximize crop yields and maintain soil health. By focusing on disciplined capital allocation, operational excellence, and sustainable mining practices, Mosaic plays a critical role in the global agricultural supply chain, ensuring that the world has the necessary resources to grow the food it needs while delivering long-term value to its shareholders and stakeholders.
